async def render_svg_to_png(svg_content, output_path, width=800, height=450):
    """使用Playwright渲染SVG为PNG"""
    async with async_playwright() as p:
        browser = await p.chromium.launch()
        page = await browser.new_page(viewport={"width": width, "height": height})

        # 创建HTML页面包含SVG
        html_content = f"""
        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
            <style>
                body {{ margin: 0; padding: 0; }}
                svg {{ display: block; }}
            </style>
        </head>
        <body>
            {svg_content}
        </body>
        </html>
        """

        await page.set_content(html_content)
        await page.screenshot(path=output_path, full_page=True)
        await browser.close()


async def main():
    """主函数"""
    print("开始生成插图2-4和2-5...")

    # 生成插图2-4
    svg_2_4 = generate_svg_2_4()
    output_path_2_4 = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "插图2-4.png")
    await render_svg_to_png(svg_2_4, output_path_2_4)
    print(f"✓ 已生成: {output_path_2_4}")

    # 生成插图2-5
    svg_2_5 = generate_svg_2_5()
    output_path_2_5 = os.path.join(OUTPUT_DIR, "插图2-5.png")
    await render_svg_to_png(svg_2_5, output_path_2_5)
    print(f"✓ 已生成: {output_path_2_5}")

    print("\n前2张插图生成完成！")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())
